case_title: MARY YANG FAMILY LLC VS. BIOMETRIX, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARY YANG FAMILY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BIOMETRIX, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: JOHN ADEMOLA) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY YANG FAMILY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BIOMETRIX, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-08-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY DENNIS YANG, DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-10-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BIOMETRIX, INC.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SC-109) (DENNIS YANG APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF: MARY YANG FAMILY LLC) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY YANG FAMILY LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARY YANG FAMILY LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED SEP-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIOMETRIX, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: J. MELIFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
